metadata.description: Public skills for security research, conference intelligence, and productivity

plugins.name: con
plugins.description: Conference intelligence for security researchers — academic (aggregate rank from CORE 2023 + Guofei Gu: IEEE S&P, CCS, USENIX Security, NDSS, IACR tiers) and industry (DEF CON, Black Hat, REcon, Troopers, hardwear.io). Live calendar via confsearch.ethz.ch and cfptime.org. Paper/talk evaluation, author search, cross-conference topic scans.
